notes: UT99 has no rcon. The rcon-control sidecar speaks GameSpy v1 to the query port (game port + 1), which is read-only and unauthenticated — hence no commands and no cvars here. rcon.py normalises the backslash-delimited infostring into `key=value` lines, which is what these patterns match. Writes (kick, say, changelevel) live behind the UWeb admin on 5580 and would need a separate transport.

queries.name: server_info
queries.description: Server name, current map, game type and player count, from the GameSpy \info\ query.
